source_name: Israel CBS Exports and Imports Monthly Files
extraction_targets: covered period from file naming (e.g., exp_1_2026.zip)

normalization_expectations.observation_summary: Israel CBS trade files provide the most granular commodity-level baseline for import/export stress analysis.

quality_checks: Verify both import and export ZIPs are present for the period.
Check for any 'Gizli Ulke' or hidden categories in accompanying metadata if available.
